model._hint: Fine-tune: ogkalu/Comic-Diffusion v2 (SD 1.5 base). All 6 comic styles trained simultaneously, each activated by its own trigger word. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 20–30 steps sufficient for SD 1.5. 25 is a solid default. | CFG 7–8 recommended. Values above 10 cause oversaturation. | SD 1.5 native 512×512. 768×512 (landscape) also works for scene compositions.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates comic-book illustrations in the style of artist Andreas Rocha — rich colours, detailed fantasy environments, painterly backgrounds, and dramatic lighting characteristic of his work.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'andreasrocha artstyle' must appear in every prompt. Examples: 'a castle on a cliff, andreasrocha artstyle', 'portrait of a medieval warrior, andreasrocha artstyle', 'a dark enchanted forest at dusk, andreasrocha artstyle'.
